cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. First, I need to look at all the given information and see when Leslie was doing other activities. The key here is to find a time when Leslie wasn't doing anything else, right? Because if someone saw Leslie somewhere else, then they couldn't have been at the beach at the same time. So let's list out all the times Leslie was seen doing things: 1. Leslie woke up at 5am. That's just a start time, not an activity duration. So maybe they were up from 5am onward? 2. Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. So during that whole time, Leslie was at school. 3. Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. So after school, Leslie went to the theater. 4. Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies from 11am to 4pm. Wait, 11am to 4pm? That's a long time at the bakery. So from 11 a.m. until 4 p.m., Leslie was there. 5. Ashley saw Leslie fixing their computer at the electronics store from 4pm to 5pm. So right after the bakery, Leslie was at the store for an hour. 6. Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. So Leslie was there in the evening. Also, the beach was closed after 10pm, so Leslie couldn't have gone after that. Now, let's map out the timeline: - 5am to 9am: in class - 9am to 11am: movie theater - 11am to 4pm: bakery - 4pm to 5pm: electronics store - 9pm to 10pm: Statue of Liberty So what's the time between these activities? Let's check the gaps. After waking up at 5am, they are at class until 9am. So no gap there. Then from 9am to 9am? Wait, the movie is from 9am to 11am. So after class ends at 9am, they go to the movie. No gap between 5am and 11am. Then from 11am to 4pm at the bakery. Then from 4pm to 5pm at the store. So after the bakery closes at 4pm, they go to the store. No gap there either. Then there's from 5pm to 9pm. What's happening then? Let's see. The next activity is at 9pm to 10pm at the Statue of Liberty. So between 5pm and 9pm, there's no reported activity. Leslie was last seen at the electronics store from 4pm to 5pm.
